name: D/D/D Alfred the Divine Sage King
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>賢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アルフレッド
name_jp_tl: DDD Alfred the Saint Sage King
desc:
2 "D/D" monsters
During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 "D/D/D" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling its materials from your hand, field and/or banishment into the Deck. If this card is banished: You can target "Dark Contract" Continuous Spells/Traps in your GY and/or banishment, up to the number of "D/D/D" monsters you control; place them face-up on your field. You can only use each effect of "D/D/D Alfred the Divine Sage King" once per turn.

action: Returns from your hand to your Deck
Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses the player's banished cards as Fusion Materials
Places cards from Graveyard in Spell & Trap Zone
Places the player's banished cards in Spell & Trap Zone
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
